reviews.review_title: Nice creepy vibes, but has bugs
reviews.review_description:
I love the scary vibe this game gives off, and I'll admit, the 2nd jump scare got me haha 😂 

Unfortunately the game has bugs:
1. When I grabbed and released the key in the 1st room, it fell through the floor which forced me to close and reopen the entire game (there is no pause menu).
2. In the 2nd room, I was able to grab the key out of the cabinet without needing to open it which was strange.
3. The 3rd room requires a code to pass, but the game didn't let me interact with the number pad at all, so I got stuck here.
